controlNotes: The XR18 is a tablet/app-controlled digital rack mixer. Access channel EQ via the X Air app (iOS, Android, or Mac/PC): select a channel, then tap the EQ section. The EQ is fully parametric with 4 bands plus a sweepable HPF. Adjustments are made by dragging EQ nodes or using on-screen sliders. Changes are applied in real-time with no save required during a session.

instructionTemplates.selectChannel: Open the X Air app and tap Channel {channel} in the channel list
instructionTemplates.openEQ: Tap the EQ tab in the channel processing view for CH {channel}
instructionTemplates.enableHPF: Enable the HPF (High-Pass Filter) toggle and drag the HP node to {frequency}Hz
instructionTemplates.setBandFrequency: Tap and drag the {band} node horizontally to {frequency}Hz, or use the frequency fader
instructionTemplates.setBandGain: Drag the {band} node vertically to {amount}dB, or use the Gain fader
instructionTemplates.saveSettings: Tap the SCENES button and save the current state to a scene slot for recall
